caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with various items. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white lettering. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the background, there are framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment. To the right, clothing racks hold various garments. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand. A small logo featuring a red circle and the words "DONE" and "TALLY" is visible in the bottom corners. The man's facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, and his right arm moves from a lowered position to being raised with his hand partially clenched, emphasizing his speech.
